title: DateField
description: Date input with a calendar popover. Localizable, with minDate / maxDate and configurable display format.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Field with label, calendar popover and medium display format by default.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Available in small, medium and large sharing the input proportions.

minMax.title: Min and max
minMax.desc: Restrict the selectable range using minDate and maxDate.

clearable.title: Clearable
clearable.desc: An ✕ button appears when a date is set to quickly clear the value.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: The field dims, blocks the popover and preserves the visible value.

props.label: Visible label above the field.
props.placeholder: Text shown when no date is selected.
props.displayFormat: Intl format used to display the selected date.
props.minDate: Minimum selectable date in the calendar.
props.maxDate: Maximum selectable date in the calendar.
props.clearable: Shows a clear button when a date is set.
props.disabled: Disables the field and prevents opening the popover.
props.readonly: Makes the field non-interactive while preserving the visible value.
props.required: Marks the field as required for validation.
props.fullWidth: The field occupies 100% of the available width.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the user selects or clears the date.
emits.open: Emitted when the calendar popover opens.
emits.clear: Emitted when the clear button is pressed.

types.title: DateField
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the DateField component props. Supports date selection with calendar popover, min/max constraints, locale and display format.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbEsc: Close the calendar popover without selecting
a11y.kbArrow: Navigate days in the calendar grid
a11y.ariaExpanded: Communicates whether the calendar popover is open or closed
a11y.ariaInvalid: Set to true when errorText is present
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Links helper or error text to the trigger for screen reader context
a11y.ariaRequired: Set to true when the required prop is active
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name when no visible label is present
a11y.focusNative: Uses a native button as trigger — participates in the tab order by default
a11y.focusTrap: Focus is trapped inside the calendar popover while it is open
